title.zh-hk: 齊次方程組與零空間結構
title.zh-cn: 齐次方程组与零空间结构

included: MATH1030-Notes.pdf §4.1 pp. 62-68: homogeneous systems, trivial solution, free-variable examples, null-space definition
MATH1030-Notes.pdf §4.2 pp. 69-70: particular solution plus homogeneous solutions
1030gi-n02-04.pdf pp. 7-8: solving homogeneous systems through RREF of the coefficient matrix
1030efghi-as02.pdf and 1030efghi-as02as.pdf: assignment pattern for particular solution plus homogeneous directions
excluded: Full singular / nonsingular matrix theory and invertibility equivalences
General set-equality, subset, and null-space intersection proofs
Eigenvalue and eigenspace applications of null spaces
Open-ended row-reduction calculator or null-space solver

frames.purpose: Establish that every homogeneous system is consistent because x=0 always works.
frames.visual: Input x=0 passes through multiplication by A and lands at the zero output.

frames.purpose: Show why the coefficient matrix determines the homogeneous solution structure.
frames.visual: A small augmented matrix [A|0] row-reduces to [R|0], with pivot and free variables labelled.

text.en: The augmented zero column stays zero.

frames.purpose: Convert free variables into parameter directions.
frames.visual: Two vectors q1 and q2 sweep points through x=sq1+tq2.

text.zh-hk: 自由變量變成零空間方向。
text.zh-cn: 自由变量变成零空间方向。

frames.purpose: Name the full solution set as N(A).
frames.visual: Directions through the origin labelled N(A)={x:Ax=0}.

text.en: N(A) is the whole homogeneous solution set.

frames.purpose: Bridge to nonhomogeneous systems without taking over the later set-language unit.
frames.visual: The null-space family is shifted by a particular solution p.

text.en: A consistent system has solution set p+N(A).
text.zh-hk: 一致系統的解集是 p+N(A)。
text.zh-cn: 相容系统的解集是 p+N(A)。

frames.purpose: Summarize how null space controls uniqueness and infinite families.
frames.visual: N(A)={0} contrasted with p+tq for q nonzero.

text.en: Null space measures the freedom left by the equations.
text.zh-hk: 零空間量度方程留下的自由度。
text.zh-cn: 零空间量度方程留下的自由度。
